title: Isle of Berk (Scales and Skies)
description: A HTTYD Modpack for Minecraft built with performance in mind! Enjoy pack filled with Dragons, Dungeons and so much more!...
body:
![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Scales_and_Skies/BH_SAS_header.webp)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Scales_and_Skies/BH_SAS_promo.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Banner Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Scales_and_Skies/BH_SAS_banner1.webp)
---
Ready to start your own HTTYD adventure? Jump into a world filled with dragons just like How To Train Your Dragon! Ride, tame and breed various dragons's throughout your world. Fight alongside them as you explore the deepest depths of a dungeon or perhaps ride them peacefully into the sunset. Soar and explore through your world with viking weapons and armour, pillaging until your heart is content. Settle down ontop of the highest volcanic peaks while drinking an ale to boost yourself! All possible in **Scales and Skies**. 

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/scales-and-skies)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/scales-and-skies)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)

![Banner Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Scales_and_Skies/BH_SAS_banner2.webp)
---
- [✔️] **Dungeons** - Feeling adventurous? Time to tackle a complex dungeon going from its peak to its deepest depths.
- [✔️] **Unique World Generation** - Fly peacefully through tall mountains and large plains, or perhaps skim the surface off deep oceans.
- [✔️] **Vikings Nd More** - What's this? You've found a viking ship and a viking village what more could this wonderful world have in store for you.
- [✔️] **Performance** - Why choose between this and Claws of Berk? Performance! Scales and Skies is built with performance in mind, none of the fancy animations included.
- [✔️] **Dragons** - The wildlife can be a bit treacherous but don't worry these flying lizards prefer a larger lunch, with over 50+ different species and over 1k+ variants, can you tame the smallest to largest of these magnificant creatures.
- **And so much more...!**

[![Banner Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Scales_and_Skies/BH_SAS_banner3.webp)](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
